title: Transform items into dynamic calendar events
excerpt:

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community!

I’d like to talk about a new app called MasterPlan Calendar. It’s a dynamic calendar that looks fantastic and is perfect for managing shifts, scheduling appointments, booking meeting rooms, or planning project timelines and more.

  • Drag and drop Functionality.
  • Easily create and resize event start and end time.
  • Sync with external calendars (like Google Calendar or Outlook) with monday native automations.
  • Dashboard widget connects multiple boards for powerful planning.
  • Personalize your calendar display with various viewing options.
  • Duplicate or delete event items with just one click.

Here is the link so you can install the app on your monday account:
https://monday.com/marketplace/10000472

gallery_image_11920×960 88.9 KB

posts.author: Naafih (Muhammed nafih)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Dor_appSolution ,
Can we display a different column as the event name in the calendar view?

For example, if the item name is “John” and there is a secondary column for the product name, is it possible to show the product name in the calendar view instead of the item name?

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml: @Naafih Hi, Currently, the event title is based on the item name, but you have the option to add extra columns to the events, such as People, Text, Status, Numbers, Link, and Location.

posts.author: jbbostick (Daniel M)
posts.cookedHtml: @Dor_appSolution are you able to view more than just the item name from the monthly view? I’d like to see 2 items on each. “Item Name” and a “Text” under the item name. similar to what is in the weekly view, just see more on monthly view.
